# Ascent Outbound OS

> A free operating system for winning clients on LinkedIn. It tells you exactly
> what to do today, and every number it shows is a real logged action. Built by
> Jamil Ahmed, founder of Ascent (https://getascent.co), who uses it daily to
> win Ascent's own clients.

## What it is

Ascent Outbound OS is a free, browser-based LinkedIn outbound operating system for agency
owners, founders doing their own sales, recruiters, consultants and freelancers.
Users import their own lead list (CSV) or add leads one at a time, and the app runs their entire daily
outbound motion: connection requests, follow-up sequences, reply handling,
deal pipeline, and client retention with MRR tracking.

## Key features

- Daily targets the user chooses (connection requests, reachouts, LinkedIn
  posts) with progress rings that fill only from real logged actions
- A truth ledger: every statistic is a logged action; undo erases it
  everywhere; nothing double counts and every number shown is real
- Focus mode: deals one lead at a time with the right message ready to copy
- Reply playbook: a written, copy-ready answer for every common reply
  (interested, price question, not now, ghosted, wrong person)
- Deal pipeline with aging: proposals that go quiet get surfaced by the due list
  until you chase them
- Clients book: won deals become retainers with MRR and check-in reminders
- Smart queue: after 30 logged requests it ranks untouched leads by the
  user's own accept rates per segment and title, and explains every ranking
- Claude built in: drafts replies in the user's own voice from their real
  templates, tailors openers from a prospect's profile, and a coach that
  reads the real ledger and says what to fix (bring your own Claude API key)
- Full lead management: CSV import, add a single lead manually, edit any
  lead's details, move leads between segments, delete with full undo
- Free account, email and password or an emailed login link; the pipeline saves to the account and
  syncs between devices, with one-file JSON backup on top

## Who makes it

Built by Jamil Ahmed (https://www.linkedin.com/in/getascent/), founder of
Ascent, a B2B GTM and outbound agency working with founders and agencies
across the USA, UK, UAE, Australia and Europe. Ascent runs done-for-you
outbound (retainers) and fixed-price outbound audits. The OS is the same
machine Ascent uses internally to win its own clients.

## Pricing

Free with a free account. Users bring their own leads and, optionally, their
own Claude API key for the drafting features. Done-for-you outbound is available from Ascent at
https://getascent.co.
